description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image. Define stages validate and build. In the validate stage add a fmt job that runs `gofmt -l -s -e .` and then exits with the count of improperly formatted files using `exit $(gofmt -l -s -e . | wc -l)`. Also add a vet job that runs `go vet -composites=false ./...` and a test job that runs `go test -race -v ./...`. In the build stage add a build job that runs `go build`. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are needed.
